chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-125 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A No.573/26. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2026. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Kalhoro, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General for the State. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh alongwith ASI Syed Intizar Ali Shah from PS Matiari. ***************************************** Mr. Aaqil Memon, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5 (Mazhar Ali), which is taken on record. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Kalhoro, Advocate for Petitioner submits that the latter is not feeling well, therefore, he is not in attendance. Learned Additional Advocate General and Advocate Prosecutor General accompanied with Investigation Officer of Crime No.12 of 2026 are present. Learned A.A.G submits that the instant Petition was filed for Quashment of FIR No.12 of 2026 lodged at PS Matiari for offence U/s 489-F PPC and in the said FIR, an interim challan has been submitted before the concerned Magistrate and submits such copy of interim challan, which is taken on record. Learned Counsel holding brief submits that since the interim challan has been submitted before the concerned Magistrate, therefore, the Petitioner would avail an appropriate remedy available under the law before competent forum and seeks disposal of Petition. In view of above, the instant Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending Application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
